description_long: This is a dark blue, polygonal barrel with a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The exterior features three horizontal black bands encircling the body, providing a sense of structural reinforcement. The rim is adorned with a metallic, zigzag-patterned band, giving it a rugged, industrial look. On one side, there is a single, prominent light blue diamond-shaped marking, which stands out against the dark surface and may serve as an identifier or decorative element. The surface appears hard and smooth, with a subtle sheen suggesting a painted or coated metal finish. The interior is not visible, but the object is likely hollow and capable of holding materials or liquids.
description: A dark blue, polygonal barrel with black bands, a metallic zigzag rim, and a light blue diamond marking on one side. The surface is hard, smooth, and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue diamond marking and all three black bands clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with no markings, only the black bands and metallic rim visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to view 1, with only the bands and rim visible, no diamond marking.
description_view_3: Another side view, nearly identical to views 1 and 2, showing only the bands and rim.
